race.comment: ICE QUAKE (12) has not raced her debut in September when she went like the wind in front but folded up late over 1140m at Geelong. Looks forward enough following four jump-outs dating back to early February, placing at the last three. Draws a good gate and should stamp herself on this race. SWIFT ENDORSEMENT (5) blew the kick then worked home well without threatening first-up from a long break over this trip at Werribee last start. Capable of mixing it with these if his barrier manners improve. WORKS DIRTY (8) missed the start then didn't do a bad job to finish midfield when resuming over 1000m at Wangaratta recently. Locally trained three-year-old who can play a key role over today's slightly longer journey. Nick Ryan's debutant DARK FOX (1) won a Flemington jump-out on 22 May. Has found a nice race to launch his career. COME DANCING (9) lines up for the first time on the back of a recent Cranbourne jump-out win. Should give a good account.
